description: Textured leather loafers from provogue for men with a refined, stacked heel. For the debonair who pushes the sartorial envelope as much as he can. The busy dotted texturing on the upper is balanced with a suede overlay on the toe box. Style this with flat front trousers, a tonal blazer and a crisp shirt. Upper Dot textured leather upper with reinforced overlay on the heel Suede overlay on the toe box Slip on styling with elasticated inserts on the sides of the tongue for ease of wearability Soft sockliner for instep comfort Brand badge on the lateral side of the midfoot Midsole Shock absorbing EVA midsole Outsole TPR outsole with a stacked heel Textured grooves on the forefoot for grip and traction Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
